compiled_state.title: Integrate Gate 2b into fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Add Gate 2b (blast radius) section to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md in post-investigation workflow.

The section:
- Runs gate-2b-blast-radius.sh with affected file paths and --repo-root
- Parses gate signal JSON from stdout
- MODIFIER behavior: never adds to primary signal count
- When triggered:true, appends evidence annotation to escalation dialog context
- Only visible when another gate has already triggered a primary signal
- When triggered:false, no action (nothing noteworthy found)
- Error handling: nonzero exit, empty stdout, JSON parse failure -> skip annotation silently, construct full 5-field gate signal with triggered:false
- Documents ast-grep/grep fallback behavior
- Documents boundary with Centrality-Aware Test Gate (pre-commit vs commit-time)
- References gate-signal-schema.md contract (from story 4b97-bd9d, story-level dep)

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 3 tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2b.py -q
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Gate 2b section
  Verify: grep -q 'Gate 2b' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] References blast radius script
  Verify: grep -q 'gate-2b-blast-radius' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Explicitly states modifier-only
  Verify: grep -qi 'modifier' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
